ham.subject: Ticket JIRA-4567 Resolved – Updated as per your feedback
ham.body:
Hi John,

I hope you're doing well. I wanted to let you know that the Jira ticket (ID: JIRA-4567) you reported regarding the deployment issue has been resolved.

*Issue Summary*: Deployment failed due to missing environment variable.
*Fix Implemented*: Updated the CI/CD pipeline configuration and redeployed the application.
*Verification*: Tested locally and on staging; all tests are passing.

Please pull the latest changes from the 'release' branch and verify on your end. If you encounter any further issues, let me know, and I'll address them promptly.

Thanks for your patience.

Best regards,
Sarah Lee
DevOps Engineer

spam.subject: Urgent: QuickBooks Invoice #987654 Due Today – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Valued QuickBooks Customer,

We regret to inform you that your QuickBooks account has an outstanding invoice (Invoice #987654) that is overdue. This invoice is also linked to your Norton antivirus subscription. Immediate payment is required to avoid service interruption.

Payment Details:
Amount Due: $1,234.56
Due Date: Today

Please click the link below to review and pay your invoice securely:
<URL>

Failure to pay within 24 hours will result in suspension of both QuickBooks and Norton services, and your company data may be permanently inaccessible.

If you believe this is a mistake, contact our billing department immediately at billing@quickbooks.com (do not reply to this email).

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Sincerely,
QuickBooks Billing Team
